label: IMS Alerting Pipeline
info: Alertmanager webhook → LINE Messaging API / MS Teams

name: Fork 5 Walker Threads
Walk CPU
Walk Storage
Walk Network (Simple)
Walk Temperature
Bypass Empty
Walk LDI (All 8 OIDs)
Load Device Registry
Resolve Device
Unified AIOps Parser v10
Split Target Devices
Map K6 to V2 Format
Format Error Alert (Line/Telegram)
Generate 254 IPs
SNMP Probe (sysName)
Register to Database
Format Alert Text
Format LINE Messaging API
Format Teams Webhook
Parse System Name
Calc CPU
Calc RAM
Calc Disks
check core
Network
save to databaes
ipaddress
save to databaes
save to databaes
save to databaes
Calc Temp
